capabilities: Emit structured events for every state change and avoid redundant on-chain state storage.

procedure.action: Specify structured events in Solidity for each state transition using the 'event' keyword by specifying schema, constraints, and invariants in machine-readable form; include at least one falsifiable acceptance criterion where error_rate < 0.001.

Emit events within contract functions using 'emit' to log state changes using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Invoke Ethereum indexers like The Graph to replay events and reconstruct state off-chain by invoking the target API with the specified parameters; assert response_status < 400 and response_time_ms < 5000; log request_id and response_code.

Invoke periodic on-chain snapshots using a 'checkpoint' function to reduce replay costs following the specified pattern; write a unit test covering the primary code path; assert test_coverage >= 0.8 for the modified module before marking complete.

Audit emitted events for completeness and accuracy during contract testing using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

summary: Leverage EVM's event-sourced architecture to use emitted events as the authoritative source of truth, reducing on-chain storage costs and simplifying state reconstruction by indexers.
title: Event-Sourced State Management in Solidity Contracts

failureConditions: Increased gas costs due to redundant state storage.

Inaccurate state reconstruction if events are incomplete; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.

High indexer replay costs without periodic snapshots; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.
metrics: test_coverage >= 0.8 for the modified module before marking complete
successConditions: Check emitted events match expected state changes during unit tests; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Verify indexer can reconstruct state accurately from events; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Measure gas usage to ensure it is optimized by avoiding redundant storage; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
